overview: Root Cause Integrative Medicine is an integrative primary care practice in Idaho Falls, ID that combines functional medicine with conventional primary care to address the underlying causes of illness. They provide comprehensive primary care services and specialized care for digestion, chronic issues, and hormonal health.
highlights: Hormone replacement therapy for men and women
Non-invasive Pulsewave Therapy for erectile dysfunction
Comprehensive food sensitivity and digestive testing
targetAudience: Families and individuals seeking primary care that addresses the root causes of health issues rather than just treating symptoms.
